flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Maine at Fort Kent fell 43% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 599).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 29% at University of Maine at Fort Kent vs the 2018–2022 baseline (638 vs 896).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at University of Maine at Fort Kent are 17% below 6-year earnings ($61.2k → $51.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Maine at Fort Kent rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.9k → $14.9k).
